title: Occidental to Announce Fourth Quarter Results Thursday, February 24, 2022; Hold Conference Call Friday, February 25, 2022
text: HOUSTON, Jan. 06, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Occidental (NYSE:OXY) will announce its fourth quarter 2021 financial results after close of market on Thursday, February 24, 2022, and will hold a conference call to discuss results on Friday, February 25, 2022, at 1 p.m. Eastern/12 p.m. Central.

title: Occidental to Provide Oxy Low Carbon Ventures (OLCV) Investor Update on Wednesday, March 23, 2022
text: HOUSTON, Jan. 05, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Occidental (NYSE:OXY) will host its OLCV Investor Update via conference call and webcast on Wednesday, March 23, 2022, at 10 a.m. Eastern/9 a.m. Central. The event will include a presentation and Q&A session.
